Name.jp: 聖なる仮面のオウルベア

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority Gauge</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>를 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Shocked</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>感電</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>감전</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>触电</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nRecovers <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> of damage dealt as Health when attacking.\nGrants <color=#28d9ed>Sustained Recovery</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> at the start of battle.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n攻撃時、ダメージの<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>を回復する。\n戦闘開始時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>継続回復</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n공격 시 피해량의 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>를 회복합니다.\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>효과를 얻습니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n攻击时,恢复伤害量的<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。\n战斗开始时,获得<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
